variants.title: HiFi Filter SO 680 Oil Filter | Replaces the Eppensteiner 167500H20LL113RP
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SO 680 Oil Filter. Providing superior protection for engines and machinery, this filter captures harmful contaminants from the oil system. Advanced filtration media traps fine particles and sludge, ensuring clean oil circulation, which reduces friction and wear on critical engine parts. This promotes better performance, increased efficiency, and longer equipment life. Designed for a wide range of applications—from automotive engines to heavy-duty industrial equipment—it offers high capacity and consistent flow rates, even under extreme conditions. The result is reduced maintenance costs and downtime, ensuring reliable, long-lasting performance.
specifications: Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency
calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 20µ @ β200

variants.title: Donaldson P165877 Hydraulic Filter, Spin-On | Replaces the Eppensteiner 167500H20LL113RP
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P165877 Hydraulic Filter, Spin-On provides dependable protection for hydraulic systems by efficiently removing particulates and contaminants. It ensures clean hydraulic fluid, promoting smooth operation and extending the lifespan of critical system components. With its easy-to-install spin-on design, this filter minimizes downtime and maintenance costs. Its durable construction and advanced filtration media make it a trusted choice for industrial and mobile hydraulic applications requiring reliable performance.
specifications: Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency
calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 20µ @ β200

variants.title: Filtrec A150G25 Spin-On Filter | Replaces the Eppensteiner 167500H20LL113RP
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec A150G25. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the A150G25 provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.

variants.title: Fleetguard HF29073 Hydraulic Filters | Replaces the Eppensteiner 167500H20LL113RP
variants.description: Fleetguard® HF29073 hydraulic spin-on filter with synthetic media is designed to help keep your precision hydraulic systems running as intended, providing a solution for various applications.  This filter meets or exceeds the equipment OEM quality and performance and is the first aftermarket replacement available on the market today, bringing your operation top-quality performance and an overall unbeatable total cost of ownership.

variants.title: Hydac 0160 MA 020 BN Spin-On Filter | Replaces the Eppensteiner 167500H20LL113RP
variants.description: Genuine Hydac 0160 MA 020 BN Spin-On Filter. Built to HYDAC’s OEM specifications and quality standards, this genuine part offers reliable performance, long service life and a precise fit. It’s suitable for a wide range of hydraulic and process applications, helping protect equipment, reduce downtime and maintain system cleanliness. For best results, match the part code to your equipment manual and verify key dimensions and ratings (size, connection, filtration grade/flow) before installation.
